activity.body: Karen Chen, Discharge Planner at UCSF Mission Bay — booked intro for Thu 2:30 PM.

messages.body:
Hi Karen,

When a patient is medically ready but the home plan is not safe yet, we help. Family Care SF is family-owned, San Francisco-based since 2001, with 24/7 on-call and one-day-or-less turnaround on most new requests. We give a clear yes or no on staffing fast so you can move the case.

Open to a 10-minute intro call later this week?

Alex Girsh
Family Care SF
care@familycaresf.com
(415) 225-4948
Hi Alex — yes, happy to talk. We have weekend discharges that fall through too often. Languages and overnight coverage matter to us. Thursday afternoon work?

Thursday works. We staff English, Russian, Tagalog, and Spanish, and we cover overnights and weekends. Does 2:30 PM work? I'll call you.

Alex
Confirmed — Thu May 14, 2:30 PM. Calendar invite sent.

activity.body: David Reyes, Elder Law at Reyes & Goldman — "send me your intake packet, I have two clients this week."

thread.subject: Reliable, documented care for your clients

messages.body:
Hi David,

For vulnerable clients who need consistency — caregivers who show up, clean documentation, fast escalation when something changes — we provide reliable, low-drama, non-medical in-home care. Family-owned, SF-based since 2001, HCO licensed.

Happy to send our one-pager if helpful.

Alex Girsh
Family Care SF
care@familycaresf.com
(415) 225-4948
Send me your intake packet — I have two clients this week. One in Pacific Heights, one in Forest Hill. Both private pay, both need reliable starts.

activity.body: Priya Anand, Social Worker at Laguna Honda — asked about overnight rates and minimum hours.

messages.body:
Hi Priya,

When a family is leaving rehab and needs to continue the plan safely at home, we step in. Caregivers trained in fall prevention, dementia care, and emergency procedures. Same-day or next-day starts when caregivers are available.

Would a quick intro call be useful?

Alex Girsh
Family Care SF
care@familycaresf.com
(415) 225-4948
Thanks Alex. Two quick questions: what's the overnight rate, and what's your minimum hours per shift? We have a Russian-speaking discharge tomorrow if you can staff it.

activity.body: Dr. Marcus Hall, Geriatrician at One Medical Pacific Heights — wants to add us to his referral list.

thread.subject: Non-medical in-home support for your patients

messages.body:
Hi Dr. Hall,

For patients who need supervision, fall-risk support, medication reminders, or family caregiver relief between your visits, we help. Family Care SF — family-owned SF agency since 2001, HCO licensed, with caregivers trained in fall prevention, dementia care, and emergency procedures.

Happy to drop off our one-pager if you keep a referral list.

Alex Girsh
Family Care SF
care@familycaresf.com
(415) 225-4948
Alex — yes, please add us to your one-pager list and I'll add you to mine. I refer about 3-5 a month. Do you cover Pacific Heights / Presidio Heights weekend overnights?

activity.body: Linda Okafor, Director at Rhoda Goldman Plaza — "not a fit right now, check back in Q3."

messages.body:
Hi Linda,

When a resident starts declining and needs more help — falls, missed meals, wandering — we can step in with private-duty support before it becomes a crisis. SF-based, family-owned, with one-day-or-less turnaround on most new requests.

Open to a quick intro?

Alex Girsh
Family Care SF
care@familycaresf.com
(415) 225-4948
Hi Alex — appreciate the note. Not a fit right now; we have a preferred list locked in through Q2. Check back in Q3 and I'll take a real look.

activity.body: James Whitcombe, Admissions at Sequoias SF — 30-min call confirmed Mon 10:00 AM.

messages.body:
Hi James,

When a Sequoias resident needs more support than IL can provide, we can step in quickly with private-duty care. Family-owned SF agency since 2001, 24/7 on-call, English/Russian/Tagalog/Spanish caregivers.

Open to a 15-min intro?

Alex Girsh
Family Care SF
care@familycaresf.com
(415) 225-4948
Hi Alex — yes. Mon 10 AM PT works for me. 30 minutes. I'll send a Zoom link.

Confirmed — Mon May 12, 10:00 AM. Looking forward.

Alex

activity.body: Outreach batch sent — 52 contacts across hospitals, attorneys, and senior living.
Rachel Brodsky, Care Manager at Institute on Aging — open to a partnership conversation.

messages.body:
Hi Rachel,

When your care plan needs reliable execution at home — caregivers who show up, clear updates, fast escalation — we help. Family Care SF is SF-based, family-owned since 2001, HCO licensed.

Would a 15-minute intro be useful?

Alex Girsh
Family Care SF
care@familycaresf.com
(415) 225-4948
Alex — open to a partnership conversation. We have plans that drift because the staffing partner isn't responsive. If you're consistent on communication and weekend coverage, we should talk.

Karen Chen, Discharge Planner at UCSF Mission Bay — booked intro for Thu 2:30 PM.
David Reyes, Elder Law at Reyes & Goldman — "send me your intake packet, I have two clients this week."
Dr. Marcus Hall, Geriatrician at One Medical Pacific Heights — wants to add us to his referral list.
Rachel Brodsky, Care Manager at Institute on Aging — open to a partnership conversation.

lastWeek.recommendation: Prioritize the 3 warm leads above this week — same-week follow-up tends to convert ~2× better than waiting.
